DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT ROGER ABUYAGHI'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NUMBERS 47, 51, 55, 59, 63, 67, 71, 75, 79, 95, 99, 103, 106, 107, 108, AND 109. THE PERSONS IDENTIFIED IN THE FURTHER RESPONSES SHALL BE SUBJECT TO A CONFIDENTIALITY ORDER AND AN ORDER LIMITING THE USE OF THE LISTS TO THE PROSECUTION AND DEFENSE OF THE CLAIMS IN THIS CASE. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO DOCUMENT REQUEST NUMBERS 3, 4, 5, AND 9. THE RESPONSE COMPLIES WITH THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE, AND THE COURT WILL NOT JUDGE THE CREDIBILITY OF THE RESPONSE. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO DOCUMENT REQUEST NUMBERS 14, 15, 16, 81, 82, 83, 84, 85, AND 86. THE REQUESTS ARE OVERLY BROAD. FURTHER RESPONSES SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER WAS NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Answers To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES WERE MADE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant And Cross-Complainant Roger Abuyaghi's Motion To Compel Further Answers To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to Special Interrogatory Numbers 47, 51, 55, 59, 63, 67, 71, 75, 79, 95, 99, 103, 106, 107, 108, and 109. The persons identified in the further responses shall be subject to a confidentiality order and an order limiting the use of the lists to the prosecution and defense of the claims in this case. The motion is denied as to Document Request Numbers 3, 4, 5, and 9. The response complies with the Code Of Civil Procedure, and the court will not judge the credibility of the response. The motion is denied as to Document Request Numbers 14, 15, 16, 81, 82, 83, 84, 85, and 86. The requests are overly broad. Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED (EAH/612)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Continued To Feb-27-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
